channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: ByteByteGoHq/system-design-101
item.description: Explain complex systems using visuals and simple terms. Help you prepare for system design interviews.

item.title: getify/You-Dont-Know-JS
item.description: A book series on JavaScript. @YDKJS on twitter.

item.title: SimplifyJobs/New-Grad-Positions
item.description: A collection of full time roles in SWE, Quant, and PM for new grads.

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: bleedline/aimoneyhunter
item.description: ai副业赚钱大集合，教你如何利用ai做一些副业项目，赚取更多额外收益。The Ultimate Guide to Making Money with AI Side Hustles: Learn how to leverage AI for some cool side gigs and rake in some extra cash. Check out the English version for more insights.

item.title: farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
item.description: This repository contains a 90-day cybersecurity study plan, along with resources and materials for learning various cybersecurity concepts and technologies. The plan is organized into daily tasks, covering topics such as Network+, Security+, Linux, Python, Traffic Analysis, Git, ELK, AWS, Azure, and Hacking. The repository also includes a `LEARN.md

item.title: dair-ai/ml-visuals
item.description: 🎨 ML Visuals contains figures and templates which you can reuse and customize to improve your scientific writing.

item.title: febobo/web-interview
item.description: 语音打卡社群维护的前端面试题库，包含不限于Vue面试题，React面试题，JS面试题，HTTP面试题，工程化面试题，CSS面试题，算法面试题，大厂面试题，高频面试题
